title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Law, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Kanjuro as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm glad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I heard you guys had been captured!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ER...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yeah... we, uh... we managed to escape.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I see.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh! That's right! The Daimyo Yasuie was showing this picture puzzle

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to people in the jail cell before he was killed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They added two lines to the snake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess that changes the meaning of this code.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The people from Wano understood what it meant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's Yasuie's last message to us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, this is probably really important, then! I'll make sure to get it to Kinemon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Please do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I got it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If any- thing happens, we'll be in the braided hat village!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GO! Your lives are the collateral.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: If you refuse, Trafalgar Law

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will cut you poor fools down to get to me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The threats of a man with nothing to lose

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do send a Shiver down the spine, don't they?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Captain! I'm so sorry! We messed-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Here. These are your lives.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Complete and total freedom.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Satisfied, TraFalgar?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Look here, men.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Do not, under any circuit-stance,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Tell straw hat that I've been captured!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WhA-??!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why, Captain?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We can't just sit still.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unfortunately, the life of our captain comes before the plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ahahaha! It's up to you, then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I will deliver!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I swear it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will see to it that Lord Yasuie's remains are properly interred.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course. Lord Yasuie is our Savior, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please... He's in your hands now. IHihihi! Ahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We're ready!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Nami! Kanjuro! Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: See you later, everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Till we meet again! I must hurry!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 44 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
